Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x05A8 "UCM-1800-05A8" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1800 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "UCM - Ultimate Combat Mission (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1800 which copies 256 bytes of data from $1820 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400.
